content.Text: I’m mapping the existing dashboard pattern first so the new CLV feature matches the app’s current controller, service, model, and view structure. Next I’m locating `ChurnPredictor` and the repository APIs it depends on so I can wire this in without inventing conventions.

`rg` isn’t available here, so I’m falling back to native PowerShell search. I’m locating the existing dashboard feature and repository contracts now, then I’ll patch the new feature into the same seams.
